meta.title: Heroes of NLP: Oren Etzioni
meta.description:
Heroes of NLP is a video interview series featuring Andrew Ng, the founder of DeepLearning.AI, in conversation with thought leaders in NLP. Watch Andrew lead an enlightening discourse around how these industry and academic experts started in AI, their previous and current research projects, how their understanding of AI has changed through the decades, and what advice they can provide for learners of NLP. 

Looking to build a career in NLP? Enroll in the DeepLearning.AI NLP Specialization: https://bit.ly/33BaG0b

Comment below with links if you recognize any of the papers referenced in this interview!

This is an interview featuring Andrew Ng and Oren Etioni, CEO of the Allen Institute for Artificial Intelligence. 

00:54 - 03:44 How did you get started in AI? Tell us your personal story
03:44 - 07:43 Open Information Extraction from the web
07:43 - 13:28 Semantic Scholar project; and the story behind it help sort out rapidly growing literature with the rise of COVID-10
13:28 - 17:57 Advice for someone that’s looking to work on or to launch a startup in NLP and the “dirty little secret of data”
17:57 - 21:00 Prediction on the future of NLP trends when researchers are building bigger and bigger models
21:00 - 23:35 Green AI
23:35 - 26:38 Advice for someone trying to build a career and looking at academia and in industry
26:38 - 31:44 Thoughts on bias, audit and regulating AI 
31:44 - 34:09 Advice for someone trying to break into NLP
